questions.text: What podcasts do you actually listen to regularly — any specific shows, hosts, or genres you keep coming back to? Do you listen while working, during commutes, or only during dedicated downtime?

When you receive a gift, what's the ideal scenario for you — do you prefer practical things you can use, experiences over things, handwritten notes, or something else entirely? And do you keep a running wishlist somewhere, or do you just hope people know what you'd like?
What's your typical beverage routine beyond coffee — do you drink tea, alcohol, energy drinks, or just water? And when you're socializing at a bar or restaurant, what's your go-to order?

What's your approach to personal care and grooming — things like skincare, haircuts, beard grooming, fragrances, or even how you present yourself on video calls? Do you have specific products you use, or is it pretty minimal?

How do you handle making new friends or building community in a new city? Are you someone who actively puts yourself out there — joining classes, apps, asking people to hang out — or do you wait for connections to happen more organically?
